preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.2.1: Auto-update reliability fix — partial downloads now fail loudly instead of producing misleading "update file corrupted" errors on flaky networks.
whatsNew: Auto-update downloads now verify the full file arrived before hashing — fixes rare "update file looks corrupted" errors caused by truncated downloads on unstable networks
